name: Rising Lava.
description:
Protect your village (in which Sidefall’s warden runs through your town.)

You’d recently established a small town on Island One. It was rather peaceful, you’d found a small spot in the islands alliance and were mostly payed no mind.

One day though things would change... Rising Lava. You were one of the firsts to be notified about it as it was close to your region but taking a look at the volcano it seemed fine... that’s when you saw IT off in the distance an unmistakable creature. The Warden.

Now how you protect your village was entirely your decision. Although you only really had two options... Run or Fight.

[notes]

Nothin much to say today, but thank you for the request. I hope you enjoy @Funni I did my best.

Song

-Where Is Your God Now, Rok Nardin.

Art I looked up Minecraft warden and used the first picture I saw 😵‍💫

Fixes have been made. Thank you Funni for pointing them out.

As always I hope You Enjoy my, darlings.
creator: Monkeyman0420
